text:
===>   Generating temporary packing list
/bin/mkdir -p /tmp/ports/usr/ports/russian/koi8r-ps/work/stage/usr/local/share/koi8r-ps
/usr/bin/tar -C /tmp/ports/usr/ports/russian/koi8r-ps/work/stage/usr/local/share/koi8r-ps -xzpf  /usr/ports/distfiles/koi8r-ps/gs-type1_koi8_fonts.tgz
/usr/bin/tar -C /tmp/ports/usr/ports/russian/koi8r-ps/work/stage/usr/local/share/koi8r-ps -xzpf  /usr/ports/distfiles/koi8r-ps/gs-type1_koi8_afm.tgz
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- Fontmap	Mon Jan 25 12:39:01 1999
|+++ Fontmap	Fri Jul 23 16:48:39 1999
--------------------------
Patching file /usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.26/Resource/Init/Fontmap.GS using Plan A...
Empty context always matches.
No such line 344 in input file, ignoring
Hunk #1 succeeded at 350.
patch: **** misordered hunks! output would be garbled
